note: Created NativeLibraryLoaderDiagnosticsTests.cs with 4 tests verifying DllNotFoundException message contains: RuntimeIdentifier, expected path with platform-correct extension (.so/.dylib/.dll), and NuGet package suggestion (WgSocket.Native.{rid}). All 4 tests pass. Used reflection to invoke private ResolveNativeLibrary with an unreachable assembly to trigger the error path.
